results.rendered_html:
ajakā, -ajikā (svārthe kan ṭāp)
1 A young she-goat.
2 [ajasya vikāraḥ avayavaḥ galastanaḥ purīṣaṃ vā] The fleshy protuberance on the neck, or its excrement.
3 A disease of the pupil of the eye.
Comp.
— jātaḥ [ajakeva jātaḥ] the above disease, ( ajāpurīṣapratimo rujāvān salohito lohitapicchilāsraḥ . vidārya kṛṣṇaṃ pracayo'bhyupaiti taṃ cājakājātamiti vyavasyet ..)
